title: Analyze repository and propose a secure refactor plan
description: Analyze this repository using the provided file list snapshot. Identify security-relevant surfaces (subprocess, path handling, secrets, network, dependency risk). Propose a phased, low-risk refactor plan with concrete recommendations. Do not assume access to private data or runtime secrets. Output must follow the secure planner schema with security_findings and refactor_recommendations populated to the best of your ability from the snapshot alone.
